ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., women's, men's, kids') */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of similar sizes (e.g., XS-S-M) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Measurement for bust in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Measurement for waist in inches */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Measurement for hips in inches */,
  "thigh" TEXT /* Measurement for thigh in inches */,
  "sleeves" TEXT /* Measurement for sleeves in inches */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Measurement for inseam in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Measurement for shoulder width in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when size record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when size record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item (e.g., modern, classic, trendy) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when clothing item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when clothing item record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when category record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item is expected to be restocked */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Warehouse location of the inventory */,
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* Shelf location within the warehouse */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity of an item that triggers a restock order */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of an item to order when the reorder point is reached */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when inventory record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouse_locations ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, sales associate, customer service rep) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the inventory */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, restock) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken by the user (e.g., viewed item details, edited item quantity) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when access log record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when size chart record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when size chart record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "thigh" TEXT /* Thigh measurement in inches */,
  "sleeves" TEXT /* Sleeves measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer measurement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer measurement record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when size recommendation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when size recommendation record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_locations" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when warehouse location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when warehouse location record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when role record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
